must_detect.matched_text:
NON-PUBLIC — Project SAFFRON (issuer workflow): Data Processing Addendum & Transfer Workflow; embargo until 2026-09-15 10:00 AST for Tadawul filing.
Parties: Al‑Nasher Robotics JSC (C R 74‑991‑2201, Riyadh) as Controller and Sand Wadi IR Services Co. (C R 11‑560‑0042) as Processor for investor-relations analytics.
Purpose & lawful basis (PDPL Arts. 5–10): processing shareholder and prospective investor data to support CMA market‑conduct submissions and a contemplated definitive share purchase agreement.
Categories: names, corporate role, emails, mobile nos., salted hash of iqama/national ID (e.g., Iqa m a: 2 3 0‑44 1‑7 6 06), beneficial‑ownership attestations, and meeting recordings.
Data subjects may submit DSARs at privacy@alnasher.example.sa or https://alnasher.example.sa/dsar?rid=MX-00A9p&loc=riyadh; identity verification uses masked IDs only (e.g., **90-**31-**77).
Cross‑border transfer: primary processing in KSA; limited transfer to CedarBloom Analytics GmbH (EU) for sentiment scoring under SDAIA pre‑approval ref S D A I A / T X / 2026‑09‑001 (pending), with encryption at rest and localization fallback.
The draft definitive SPA for Project SAFFRON contemplates consideration of SAR 412,000,000 for 60% of Al‑Nasher Energy Solutions LLC, subject to CMA approval and settlement T+2 after announcement.
MAC/MAE: closing is conditioned on no Material Adverse Change; normal seasonal demand shifts and routine supplier delays shall not constitute a MAC, and no MAE has occurred as of 2026‑06‑05.
Board memo from Dr. Laila Al‑Fahmi (Chair) instructs IR to withhold outreach and roadshow decks until embargo lifts and the CMA disclosure is posted to Tadawul; draft Q&A attached.
As already disclosed in the public Tadawul bulletin dated 2025‑01‑05, the Company’s FY‑2025 dividend policy remains under review; this sentence relies solely on public sources.
pm note: confirm dpia template, update records of processing a n d finalize flow diagrams after uat; todo: schedule kickoff with it sec after eid; assign owner in jira.
Retention: shareholder registers 10 years; IR inquiry logs 24 months; trading‑sensitive research notes 18 months; audit trails 5 years per CMA Conduct Regs; anonymization after expiry with SHA‑256 key destroy.
